title: campanula bellidifolia subsp. meyeriana
intro: Campanula bellidifolia subsp. meyeriana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Campanula, commonly known as the alpine bellflower. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and ease respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Campanula bellidifolia subsp. meyeriana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
